quote: A language that doesn't affect the way you think about programming is not worth knowing.
author: Alan J. Perlis

quote: An idiot admires complexity, a genius admires simplicity.
author: Terry A. Davis

quote: First, solve the problem. Then, write the code.
author: John Johnson

quote: The most positive men are the most credulous.
author: Alexander Pope

quote: Intelligence is quickness in seeing things as they are.
author: George Santayana

quote: When a true genius appears, you can know him by this sign: that all the dunces are in a confederacy against him.
author: Jonathan Swift
